name: Saint Nicholas
description_short: Saint Nicholas Federal Credit Union is a community-focused credit union serving Wilkes-Barre, PA with checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and online banking.
description_long: Saint Nicholas Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union based in Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania, serving the local community and surrounding service areas. The institution operates as a member-owned cooperative financial institution regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration). According to the website, the credit union emphasizes enhancing the financial well-being of its members through personalized service and competitive rates. Saint Nicholas FCU offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including high-yield checking and savings accounts (Share Draft and Share Savings accounts), flexible auto financing for both new and used vehicles, mortgage options for home purchase and refinancing, investment and retirement planning services, and robust online and mobile banking platforms. The credit union provides educational resources through calculators for auto loans, mortgages, savings growth projections, and credit card payoff scenarios. Members can access services via online banking, branch visits, or by phone at (570) 825-2640. The credit union distinguishes itself through member-exclusive benefits and discounts, dedicated financial planning and wealth management services, and a focus on community engagement in the Wilkes-Barre area. According to NCUA data cited on their website, they hold 979 active share savings accounts. Auto loan offerings serve over 30 members with new vehicle financing and 78 members with used vehicle loans, with an average loan amount of $16,000 and competitive rates starting at 6.00% for new vehicles and 8.00% for used vehicles. As a traditional credit union, Saint Nicholas operates with geographic and membership restrictions typical of smaller regional institutions. The website indicates zero checking accounts reported to NCUA, which may reflect outdated data reporting or a data anomaly. The institution provides solid mainstream banking services but lacks the digital-first innovation or extensive branch network of larger banks and credit unions.
services: High-yield savings accounts (Regular Share Savings accounts)
New auto loans with rates starting at 6.00%
Used auto loans with rates starting at 8.00%
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Loan calculators (auto, mortgage, savings growth, credit card payoff)
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 6.00% for new vehicles and 8.00% for used vehicles
Member-owned cooperative structure with exclusive member benefits and discounts
Comprehensive online and mobile banking capabilities for convenient account management
NCUA-regulated with federal insurance protection on deposits
Personalized financial planning and wealth management services available to members
Multiple account options including high-yield checking and savings accounts
Serves local Wilkes-Barre community with dedicated branch presence and local service
cons: Limited geographic reach restricted to Wilkes-Barre, PA service areas only
Data inconsistency shows zero checking accounts on NCUA records despite offering checking services
Smaller institution with likely fewer branches and ATM locations compared to major banks
Website lacks transparency on savings account interest rates and specific mortgage terms
No mention of credit card products or other modern financial services common at larger credit unions
best_for: Wilkes-Barre, PA residents seeking community-focused banking with personalized service
Local auto buyers looking for competitive rates on new and used vehicle financing
Members prioritizing credit union membership structure and cooperative ownership benefits
Customers wanting online banking convenience combined with local branch relationships
diagnosis: Saint Nicholas FCU is best for Wilkes-Barre residents seeking traditional community banking with competitive auto loan rates and personalized service. The main caveat is geographic limitation—membership is restricted to the Wilkes-Barre service area, and the institution lacks the digital innovation or product breadth of larger credit unions and banks.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
